title: SHARKOON Drakonia Gaming Mouse - Black
description: The Drakonia Black is the follow-up model to our popular Green Drakonia. Like before, the Drakonia Black has eleven buttons and a 4-way scroll wheel, with each being freely programmable through the included configuration software to perform various different functions. An ADNS-9800 laser sensor from Avago operates under the gray dragon scales casing, with the current DPI setting in use indicated by a constantly illuminating LED. The SoftSkin surface of the Drakonia Black offers a soft grip and prevents perspiration build-up, ensuring the mouse fits perfectly in the hand even during heated battles. Likewise, the ergonomic shape of the Drakonia Black is designed for stability and control: its outwardly curved underside offers more grip during very small and precise movements as well as a high-level of comfort during long gaming sessions. Therefore the Drakonia Black is aimed especially at FPS Snipers and RTS/RPG gamers - the type of players who typically launch themselves into long battles and epic adventures. In the underside of the Drakonia Black you will find six metal weights comprising the Weight Tuning System, allowing the fighting weight of the mouse to be adjusted at any time. Unleash your inner Dragon – with the Drakonia Black!
features: Programmable Buttons: 11
gold-plated usb connector
Chip: Avago ADNS-9800
Max. DPI/CPI: 8,200
Cable Length: 180 cm

How to use:
1.Please slide the top cover backwards,then you can see the USB receiver and battery slot;When using it, it is best to plug the USB receiver into the computer first and then install the battery to turn the switch on. Prepare 2* AAA battery when you first use it(not included);Turn on the switch,use on mouse pad,the mouse and receiver will connect automatically in a few seconds. 2.If not connect,please turn off the mouse switch,pull down the USB receiver,then plug the USB receiver and turn on the mouse switch again, press the 3 buttons(left button,right button,scroll wheel) together at same time for about 3-5 seconds.
Notes:
Cute design with LED headlight,the headlight is formed only because of light transmission,sometimes it hides inside that you cannot see it,this won't affect use. The light is not strong,this could save battery power.

1 x Wireless mouse 1 x USB receiver (placed inside the top cover) 1 x Using instruction

reviews.title: Sucks, Slow, Terrible, Missing pieces.
reviews.text:
Extremely slow unless you know how to disable 50 or so features that run off the bat. The mouse came with no bluetooth adapter, and this doesn't have built in bluetooth.
Seriously don't buy HP.

1 hour of ownership update: It's stopped opening windows. It brings up the login screen, then I get a black screen. The computer no longer works and I've done nothing to it. There are several other reviews referring to this issue.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: so far its a great buy. I like it

reviews.title: Excelent value laptop
reviews.text: My daughter needed a faster more copact laptop for her graphics software so we gave this one a try.  Very fast, easy setup...nice and easy to chuck the bloatware.  A reasonable price made it an easy choice...so much so that we purchased another.

reviews.title: Definitely returning and buying a different brand
reviews.text: I had high hopes for this laptop... very very very slow. I mean how can a company like HP in this day in age make a laptop this slow. I didn’t expect speeds you would see in a gaming laptop for this price but I at least want to be able to watch a movie or even start the laptop within 10 minutes, and they don’t even allow you to upgrade the RAM or anything from what I can tell... and the battery life is laughable, like a previous comment said, about 1 percent per minute. I would even go as far as to say that it dies faster than that. Purchased this for my sister for her birthday but will definitely return and go with a different laptop.

reviews.title: Cute item but it doesn't stay connected.
reviews.text:
Super cute item! It took me a while to get use to the small click space and it tracks well but the main issues is the USB isn't reliable. Anytime I put the laptop to sleep or I don't use the mouse for a while I have to unplug the USB and turn the mouse on/off. It is really inconvenient but my return wind has closed to exchange it.

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

reviews.title: low quality
reviews.text: I received a replacement for the first one that would shut off and on constantly. The 2nd one worked for about a week and then stopped. When trying to remove the USB connector from my laptop it cam apart. Part of it got stuck in the USB port. It took over 5 minutes to pull the rest of it out with tweezers! I returned it for a refund. This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Cheap- don’t buy it!
reviews.text: This mouse works some of the time... very cute but unreliable. For the return process, I had to pack and ship on my own. It cost half the price of the mouse to return.

reviews.title: Cutest thing ever
reviews.text: So adorable! It moves super smoothly and I love the color. It is wider than most mice I'd say, but not by much. It still feels natural and easy to use. The buttons are easy to use as well. My only concern is that when I have to wake my computer up from sleep mood, I really have to shake it. But that may be my sensitivity settings, but they were just fine with my previous mouse. Either way, this is super cute and I love it!

reviews.title: DESTROYS PORTS! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.text: The first one died after 2 hours. It damaged the port on one side of my laptop. The replacement did the same thing to the other side. I now have no functioning ports - can’t use another mouse or flash drives. This company owes me a new laptop!!!!

reviews.title: Leadsail is my brand
reviews.text: Leadsail is my go to brand for quality computer mice.  This is the fifth one I have gotten and they all work flawlessly. I have rather large hands and this mouse is perfect to grip and maneuver.  It also is indeed silent which is not really an issue for me.  What I look for is design, function and durability and you get that with all Leadsail products.  Recommend.

title: Neises Ergonomic Mouse, Bluetooth Mouse for ipad,Bluetooth Mouse for MacBook Air/Mac/MacBook Pro/Mini/ipad Pro/iMac/Laptop,Rechargeable Wireless Mouse for MacBook Air/MacBook pro Chromebook Laptop PC
description:
Tip:Scientific ergonomic design maintains healthy wrist and arm positions to achieve smoother movement and reduce overall stress.
How to use it:
A. 2.4Ghz Mode:
Switch to "ON/OFF" button to right.And Plug the receiver into the USB port or use a USB C adapter to plug into the type c port of your computer, Then you can use the mouse in 2.4GHz Mode.
B. Bluetooth Mode:
Switch on Bluetooth on your device and power on the mouse. Press the DPI Button or Press Left,Roller and Right 3 Buttons together for 5 seconds.When the mouse name coming up on the device.Click it and it will be connected.
Note:
System Requirement: Windows 8/10, Android 4.2 and above,Mac & IOS 10.10(Compatiable with 4.2BLE、4.1BLE、4.0BLE or earlier)
Package Included:
1* Dual Mode Mouse
1* Charging Cable
1*USB Receiver (under earth the mouse)
1*Type C Adapter
Note:
1. It's out of power if the mouse cursor moves slowly or stop moving. Please recharge it. Note: Please do not charge the mouse with mobile phone charger.
2. Please charge the mouse for 2 hours before the first time to use it. The blue light beside the scroll wheel will be on while charging, and then goes off when the mouse is fully charged.
3. Not all computers support two modes. For example, Win 7 system does not support Bluetooth mode.
4. There is memory function on Bluetooth Type Mouse.When the mouse has connected another device,and now you would like connect the device not connected with the mouse last time, it should re-connect with the device.
5. If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.
features: 【2022 Latest Upgrade Optical Ergonomic Design】Reduce the overall pressure on the hand, specially designed for long-term use of the mouse, providing a more comfortable way to use.

【DUAL MODE BLUETOOTH MOUSE(BT 5.1 + 2.4GHz)】Dual mode wireless mouse one mouse can switch freely between two devices. Note: If choosing Bluetooth connecting way, don’t insert USB receiver to the device you would to connect.Otherwise,it will choose 2.4G connecting way automatically.

【BUILT-IN BATTERY AND AUTO ENERGY-SAVING】The mouse built-in rechargeable battery, with a charging cable. No need to change batteries. To saving power, the mouse will fall asleep after 10 minutes no-operation, it can be waken up by clicking any button.

【3 ADJUSTABLE DPI LEVELS AND SILENT CLICK】 Among 1000, 1200 and 1600 to meet different needs. Special soundless design for the right and left buttons, make you concentrate on working or playing games without disturbing others.
【MULTI-FUNCTION BUTTON】Forward and backward button to provide convenience for browsing pages and games.

reviews.title: Liked it but doesn’t last long
reviews.text: The reviews seemed to be a mix so I figured I’d give the mouse a shot with my MacBook. Worked great until one week after the return window closed and now it’s worthless junk. I would skip this.

reviews.title: Wheel Started Squeaking Less than 2 Weeks into Usage
reviews.text: I love the design of this mouse but the scrolling wheel started squeaking when used less than 14 days into using this mouse and it's, quite honestly, a bit maddening.  I can't figure out WHY it's squeaking and I've tried using compressed air to maybe clean something that might have gotten into the mouse to no avail.  It still squeaks.  All. The. Time.

reviews.title: Works perfectly with my iPad
reviews.text:
I bought this so I could mirror my iPad to my 27" iMac and play some gorgeous games on a big screen. The mouse lets me use the iPad as an, um, mousepad...works beautifully. The instructions were easy to follow and the box contains a wireless receiver if you don't want to use bluetooth. Also in the box is a USB adapter if you need to plug the receiver into a USB-C port.

And finally, the color-changing light bar is kinda sexy. A bargain at the price.

reviews.title: Great mouse
reviews.text: Love this mouse. Attached it to an iPad keyboard so now able to use it along w/ iPencil & touch screen. Very easy to use, fits in my hand comfortably & the light that emanates from it is a nice touch.

reviews.title: I’d move on, if i were you…
reviews.text: It was an ok product only until 2.5/3 months after purchase when it stopped working…. It’s only used for person use 2-3X a week.. so it’s announced my that it broke already!!!!

title: Corsair Ironclaw Wireless RGB, Rechargeable Wireless Optical Gaming Mouse with Slipstream Technology (18,000 DPI Optical Sensor, 3-Zone RGB Multi-Colour Backlighting), Black
description: The Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless Gaming Mouse combines an ultra-accurate native 18, 000 DPI optical sensor with a durable contoured shape that’s ideal for larger hands and palm grips. Easily connect to your PC via hyper-fast, sub-1ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless Technology Bluetooth or USB wired connection, with up to 50 hours of battery life. Powerful Corsair iCUE software allows you to precisely tune sensitivity in 1 DPI steps, customize the ten programmable buttons with macros or remaps, and synchronize your mouse’s three-zone RGB lighting with all your iCUE-compatible Corsair devices. With the freedom of wireless and the customizable precision you need to take your gameplay higher, take victory in hand with the Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless.
features: Three Ways to Game: Connect with hyper-fast, sub-1 ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless technology, low-latency bluetooth, or USB wired
Comfort when it counts: Contoured shape that’s sculpted specifically for palm-grips and larger hands

Powerfully precise optical gaming sensor: A custom Pixart PMW3391 native 18,000 DPI sensor, adjustable in one DPI resolution steps, gives you total sensitivity customization and ultra-accurate tracking
Ten fully programmable buttons: Customise the way you play with powerful macros and key remaps to give you an in-game advantage
Ultra-durable Omron Switches: Rated for more than 50 million clicks

reviews.title: Excellent design and clean software- dollar store plastic mouse
reviews.text:
Worked great for three months; varying software issues and the mouse spontaneous resetting had us replace the mouse with the same one, as the setup and software for this mouse is very easy. The programmable buttons are easy to reach and press. However, if I am paying 200 for a mouse, I expected more than 3 months of use.

Edited to add:
New mouse worked almost two months before the mouse wheel stopped functioning. Went to a different brand. Cannot in good conscience recommend.

reviews.title: Mouse Hasn't Worked Properly Since Day 1, Customer Service Slow to Respond/Ineffective
reviews.text:
I bought this mouse brand new. It has NEVER worked as advertised, and Corsair's customer support team has done nothing to make it right. The mouse couldn't connect via GHz on my Macbook (despite Corsair and its reps claiming it should work on macOS. See:

https://www.amazon.com/ask/questions/Tx1JD042VHLLA6L/ref=ask_dp_dpmw_al_hza

I then tried to use a Windows laptop to connect to iCUE and program the mouse. AGAIN, nothing. They've implied that the mouse might have some compatibility issues, but that should've been addressed! They haven't even offered to refund me or replace the mouse. Stay far away from this mouse, and if you value good, responsive customer service, stay away from this company.

reviews.title: Good mouse for the most part
reviews.text: I bought mine at Best Buy and not Amazon. It lasted about a year and a half. Still mostly works but the wheel button doesn't work anymore.  If you are going to use the wheel button a lot, don't buy this mouse. Other problems include the battery doesn't last too long, can't customize when it is in Bluetooth mode, and it has the habit of thinking every time you plug it into the computer to charge it is a new mouse so it creates a new profile. It looks great and feels great though and I would buy it again if it didn't cost so much money

title: Vassink Wireless Mouse Ergonomic Mouse Rechargeable Vertical Optical Mice with USB Receiver, 6 Buttons 2.4GHz Adjustable DPI 800/1200/1600 for PC Computer,Laptop,etc（Black）
features: ★【Ergonomic-Wireless Mouse】The design of the vertical wireless ergonomic mouse fits the size and contour of the palm, reducing the pressure on the palm and making your wireless mouse control more comfortable and natural.

★【Efficient and Sensitive-Easy to Use】The ergonomic mouse has 6 convenient buttons design, plug and play; Adjustable 800/1200/1600 DPI mouse movement speed. Optical tracking technology has higher sensitivity than standard optical mouse, usable Smooth and precise tracking on a variety of surfaces.

★【Silent Design-Fashionable Charging】Wireless mouse adopts button-quiet design, low decibel is more suitable for public places such as libraries, dormitories, offices, high-speed rail planes; with built-in lithium battery (500mAh) and USB data cable (150cm) charging device, Make your use more fashionable and convenient

We provide 12 months of worry-free after-sales service. If you encounter any problems with the wireless mouse during use, please feel free to contact us.

reviews.title: Responsiveness is abysmal
reviews.text:
I have a Fellowes mouse pad (vinyl material) and this mouse moves the pointer on it like it is stuck in mud - very slow. Yes, i removed the coated ovals on the bottom. I tried on my desktop protective cover (a softer plastic) and it was even worse. Putting the mouse on paper made it move the mouse pointer faster and smoother but occasionally had hiccups. This is unacceptable for gaming, let alone basic office work. This wasn't even the worse part of this mouse.

The mouse buttons require you to click on the very edge of the button to recognize the click. Because my finger tips reach about 75% of the length I would have to click 3+ times to get Windows 11 to recognize I clicked the button. I made sure to charge the battery to 100% and tried numerous USB ports on my computer and on my docking station to no avail. Would not recommend.

reviews.title: Helped my forearm pain and works as described
reviews.text: Works as described, more natural wrist position and seems to be helping my forearm pain

reviews.title: Very nice mouse!
reviews.text:
I've seen a few of these mice around and this one was inexpensive enough to give the design a try. I normally use only Bluetooth mice because I don't like losing a USB port to a dongle, but made an exception.

I have to say I'm impressed with this device. The performance is rock-solid and it feels great to use. I also like the slightly rubberized finish; feels good in the hand. What I'm doing is alternating between this and a conventional mouse every few days to give my wrist a break. The reduction in wrist discomfort is noticeable.

It's worth losing a USB port to a dongle

reviews.title: Ergonomics
reviews.text: The concept of this mouse is that your hand is in a more natural position when you use it. That part works fine. There is a hesitation that occurs from time to time that will cause you some angst. The mouse button has to wake it from sleep mode, which also takes some getting used to. Overall it is a decent mouse and surprisingly easy to adapt to.

title: Unipows Wireless Mouse - 2.4G Slim Portable Computer Mouse with Nano Receiver, Less Noise Mobile Optical Mice for Notebook, PC, Laptop, Computer, Mac (Black and Grey)
description:
Enjoy freedom and efficiency when you use the Wireless Mouse. Compact design, easy to take to anywhere. Plug the nano transceiver into your computer's USB port for a reliable wireless connection without any hassle of additional wire and driver. High Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Quiet clicks make you concentrate more on your work, and don’t disturb people around.
Product features:
Wireless connectivity for reliable usage Advanced optical mouse with responsive tracking Noiseless click, soft touch  High dpi movement resolution works on most surfaces. Wireless mouse reduces workspace clutter 3-button mouse for better functionality and fast scrolling capability
Specification:
Dimensions: 1.4 x 2.6 x 4.7 inches (H x W x D)  Battery: 1 x AA battery (not included) Handedness: Ambidextrous Interface(s): USB 2.0 Wireless: Yes Warranty: 1 year Brand Compatibility: Universal Model Compatibility: PC, Laptop, Windows devices System Requirements: Windows XP, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows 8, Windows 10, Windows 2000, Mac OS X 10.4 or later Number of Buttons: 3 Mouse Operation: Button(s) with scroll wheel Plug and Play Operation: Yes
Package include:
1 x Wireless Mouse 1 x USB nano Receiver (stored in back of the mouse)
features: Portable and Noiseless - Stow the USB receiver inside the wireless mouse when not in use. Take it to anywhere like home, office, coffee shop, etc. Responsive buttons provide soft click with less noise.

2.4GHz Stable Wireless Connection - A tiny wireless receiver (stored in back of the mouse) provides stronger anti-interference ability, faster transmission speed and more reliable connection up to 15m (49 feet), without any hassle of additional wire and driver. Just plug and play.

Enduring Quality & Power Saving - High DPI Movement resolution allows the mouse to track on nearly any surface. Rated to 5 million comfortable clicks. Turn into sleep mode in 8 minutes of inactivity for energy saving, easily activated by clicking any button. 1 AA Battery (NOT Included) is needed for this mouse.
Ergonomic Shape & Smooth Hand Feeling - Slim ergonomic design and smooth surface for an incredible user experience. Space grey perfect for office use, and can match any color device.

Wide Compatibility - Work with Windows XP, Windows Vista, Windows 7, Mac OS X 10.4 etc. NOTE: This product is connected by USB receiver, and is NOT compatible with Macbook pro or other laptops which only come with type C port.

reviews.title: Very cute.
reviews.text:
Really love this mouse. It is very cute, lightweight, easy to use and comfortable in your hands. Very easy to set up. Only issue was the back covering is a bit loose. Think it is a factory fault or something. It isn't falling off so far though, thankfully. That's is why it lost a star.

Overall I was very pleased with the product. Really looovvvve how cute it looks.

reviews.title: Perfect !
reviews.text: Bought this mouse to replace my old one . This one is super quiet . Scrolls perfect world perfect . It takes 1aa battery and that’s great ! The price was great and the mouse is well worth every penny!

reviews.title: ASMR fantastic!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:5a9baeffb5013de01b566ac34f1da8a5]] Love the way this keyboard sounds as I type.  I also like that the round keys allow a little more room in between keys and that I don’t make as many errors while typing.  The color is great and the design is think and sleek.

reviews.title: my favorite keyboard
reviews.text: This keyboard is the best! It is comfortable to use, matches my desk setup perfectly, and best of all, the keys AND the mouse are basically totally silent! My 10-month-old is a VERY light sleeper! Everything wakes her up, but not these. A major win for me! Highly recommend. 100% I would buy this again! (batteries are not included. You need one aa battery for the keyboard and also the mouse)

reviews.title: Wired + Wireless?  Work for you? Good multimedia controls & phone slot
reviews.text:
Not a fan of wireless accessories (the batteries typically fail without warning, makers want you to be surprised), I made an exception for this pairing model because the keyboard is wired.

PRO
-Ubiquitous AA battery for mouse
-Economical
-Numeric pad
-Multimedia buttons: Volume knob, buttons for mute, pause, previous, next
-A place to put your phone (nice touch!)

CON
-Neither is backlit
-KB not programmable

NEUTRAL
-Non-'clack-y' key design, these are "quiet"
-Some humans will like pink, not widely available, maybe a good gift
-Con (for me) is the wireless mouse

reviews.title: Fun cordless mouse and keyboard
reviews.text: This is a great little retro cordless keyboard and mouse combo. I ordered it because it has just one dongle that both operate from. That gives me more USB ports available for other things. It works great as long as the keyboard and mouse are close to the laptop or the tower. It lags a bit when it’s in a keyboard drawer. I like the compact and portable nature this setup includes!

reviews.title: pink keyboard and wireless mouse
reviews.text: Love the pink color of this retro keyboard and mouse.  Great that the keyboard is spill proof I can have my coffee and not worry about wrecking my keyboard.  Easily plugged right into my all-in-one computer.  Took me a little while to get used to the punk keycaps, and now I love how quiet and comfortable they are to use.  The mouse fits well in my hand, and the wheel rolls back and forth smoothly. Top 5 stars for this one!

title: EAXBUX 【Built in Jiggler Covert Mouse Jiggler,2 in 1 Wireless Mouse with Jiggler, Undetectable Mouse Mover with ON/Off Switch, Drive Free,Simulate Mouse Movement to Keep Computer Awake,Plug and Play
features: 【Mouse Combined with Mouse Jiggler】The EAXBUX Mouse with jiggler is currently the only product on the market that combines a wireless mouse with a mouse jiggler. When you need to leave your computer for a short while, just press a button to activate the mouse jiggler function to keep you online

【Random Movement to Keep PC Active】EAXBUX mouse jiggler will keep your PC/Laptop active by moving the cursor automatically. Just press the ON/OFF button to turn on the mouse jiggler function,the computer screen will always on,thereby keeping your Microsoft Teams, Lync,Skype etc. stay online.Simulate real random mouse movement and this mouse mover 100% undetectable byIT because it is just a wireless mouse that with mouse jiggler function. Absolutely security!

【2.4G wireless mice】The unique feature of EAXBUX Mouse with jiggler is that if you don't press the button of the jiggler function, it is a practical 2.4G wireless optical mouse, which can meet the needs of your daily use.One with dual functions, this wireless mouse with mouse jiggler function is definitely your best choice

【Driver-Free & Plug and Play】The wireless mouse with mouse mover requires no driver, just plug it into your computer and if you need the jiggler function, just press the button, the cursor will start to move automatically. No annoying software installation, easy to use.

What we care about most is the customer experience！

reviews.title: Hey it works great HIGHLY RECOMMEND
reviews.text:
It works does random motion immediately recognized by my dell laptop workstation
I’m not monitored by my boss so can’t give insight to that consideration. IT KEEPS MY SCREEN open so I don’t have to keep logging in
Wish the jiggle button had a light to tell it’s active HOWEVER perhaps this is a good thing (it immediately jiggles so I know it’s working) no light no one knows around me it’s on
I’d highly recommend this

reviews.title: Great Wireless Mouse and Jiggler
reviews.text: This mouse is the perfect size and weight, moves well and clicks quietly. I love the jigglier functionality; you just press the button built into the mouse and it keep the mouse cursor moving on the screen. It keeps my window open and Office teams active. I should have gotten a mouse like this long ago; it allows you additional freedom at work when you need to be away from your desk for a while. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Very good idea
reviews.text: Very good idea to have this jiggler built in, other similar products need to have an additional equipment, and put mouse on it for moving, not as convenient as this one. But sometimes this product is not stable, after a couple of hours working, I found the mouse stopped moving, I checked and found the battery light was off due to unknown reason, and after I reset the battery, the mouse moved again, and such kinds of issue happened several times. Therefore, I can only gave 4 stars review. But anyway I like this cute tool.

reviews.title: Keep screensavers from activating or keep from being logged off for no activity!
reviews.text:
A very handy, take it with you mouse that will keep pretty much anything from timing out due to lack of activity. When you need to step away for a few minutes and not have anything you are working on, just press the button on top to activate the jiggler and keep the mouse pointer gently moving.
I have only had this for a week or so and it has already proved it's worth. When my screen saver kicks off any process I have running slows way down. When I am rendering media this is a major pain, or I should say "used to be a major pain".
The dongle for USB connectivity stores in the mouse itself so you can carry the mouse and never have to worry about losing the dongle. It also has an on/off switch to save battery life.
A nice piece of gear, I suggest this for anyone that doesn't want to time out again.

reviews.title: Quiet and Functional
reviews.text:
I have been searching for a product like this for a long time! I work remotely most days and have to rely on connecting through a VPN connection. The connection automatically disconnects after a certain time frame, so this jiggler function is great! I can click the button to activate and leave the computer.
The setup on this mouse is so simple. I plugged in the USB and the mouse worked right away.
My favorite feature that was unexpected was how quiet the mouse is. I wasn’t use to not being able to hear a click. Such a nice product!

reviews.title: Wonderful mouse for the price!
reviews.text: I love this mouse! It fits perfectly in my hand, and the usb Bluetooth works great with no issues. The clicks are silent, but the scroller click is not silent. This is fine for me since I don’t use my scroller to click very often, but if that bothers you, I thought it was important to point out.

reviews.title: Lightweight and Responsive
reviews.text: This little mouse is nice and responsive. I really enjoy using it. It's comfortable, too. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: Not what I expected.
reviews.text:
It’s super super lightweight and feels very cheap. It comes with no instructions what so ever. It comes with a little usb input and so I plug it into my Chromebook and put in one AA battery. I flip the switch to on and it starts glowing red. I don’t know what the red light means, again, no instructions. Are the batteries dead? Is it not connected? No idea.
I open up the Bluetooth menu and it’s scanning and nothing is coming up and then I realize the cursor is moving with the mouse. I start rolling it around and it has horrible traction. It’s not a smooth motion as you’d expect from a mouse. Again, maybe my batteries were low, maybe the connection was low, I can’t say, although I switched out the batteries about 3 times and I doubt all 3 batteries were close to dead. I bought this for my sons online homework that he has to do, it consist of a lot of dragging items to designated locations on the screen and he’s been having difficulty using the mouse pad on the Chromebook . But it’s so flimsy, my daughter picked it up and lost it amongst the mess of toys and I don’t even feel at a loss.

reviews.title: Sleek and Elegant
reviews.text: This Mouse is a perfect match for our white Cherry keyboard. It has all the basic functions you need without the fancy programable buttons that some gaming people use. We find it exacting in use when we do retouching in Photoshop and movements are precise, with the nano receiver, and fast all the time. This is a good basic mouse to use every day on any computer. It's attractive and fits your hand comfortably.

reviews.title: Worked straight out the box
reviews.text: Small and comfortable. Easy to set up and use. Great value.

reviews.title: Five Stars

reviews.title: Portable, durable and pretty
reviews.text: I travel for work and needed something light and easy to take with me to various work locations. I had a Microsoft wireless mouse but for some reason it didn't properly scroll in some of the programs I use for work so I replaced it with this one. reviews.title: A very nice mouse.
reviews.text:
I tried to use both of the most recent Apple mouse products with my Macbook Pro and never could get the hang of either one of them. I tried configuring them in the applications folder but never could get it right plus neither one of them was comfortable. One had a ball and the other newer one did not. Usually I really like apple products but not this time. I am happy to report this Logitech worked right out of the box after I plugged in the USB thingy. i didn't even have to set it up. I do like the roller ball. I think this mouse can do more than I know about, but am just happy it isn't changing the page I am on constantly. I got the one that was painted blue and green because it was about 6.00 cheaper than the solid colored ones. I like the design now that I have it. Since my laptop only has two USB plug ins, I bought the Amazon USB hub with three additional spots. Am happy with that too.
UPDATE 11-08-14
All of a sudden I am getting these messages saying the battery is critically low. To start with I was changing the batteries every time but it was happening way too fast so I bought a battery checker. Turns out my batteries are fine. Testing 100 %. the mouse continue to operate even though I continue receiving low battery warnings. Don't know how this is going to play out but it is the first sign of trouble. Now I just take battery out. Test it and when it continues to say 100 % I put it back in and the message goes away for a couple of days. Aggravating. I am amending star count down to 4 stars. Can't change stars.

reviews.title: Works great - great little wireless mouse.
reviews.text: I got this for my daughters birthday - she loved the design.  It synced right up and worked immediately.  It worked great with her computer - she really liked he feel of the mouse.  It is easy to pack away and travel with as well.

reviews.title: The middle click and scroll wheel work great! Microsoft 4000 is smoother and more comfortable though.
reviews.text:
I own this mouse as well as the Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 now. I find them to be head to head competitors, so here's a quick comparison.

Logitech:
-Somewhat of a loud click, doesn't bother me personally, but it is obviously louder
-The harder you flick the scroll wheel the more it'll spin. There is resistance though and I feel like it's easier to use than the Microsoft mouse.
-It looks cool and functionality is fine. The middle click is easy to use and the left/right of the wheel to move back or forward in a web browser works and isn't annoyingly used by accident.

Microsoft:
-Quiet click and smoother sliding on the desk
-The wheel stops once your finger leaves it. You can't just flick and go. Scrolling seems more precise with this one, but I actually prefer the Logitech as I feel like I have more functional control with it.
-There is a side button that moves you backward in a web browser, the wheel left and right tilting doesn't seem to do anything.
-More comfortable in my hand.

Bottom line: Microsoft Wireless Mobile Mouse 4000 is smoother and more comfortable, but Logitech is more functional, especially for the middle click and scroll wheel. I was very skeptical about the benefits of this "free-wheel" but I love it now. If you're not a big scroll wheel and middle click enthusiast go with the Microsoft, otherwise the Logitech is for you.

reviews.title: What you pay for. Cheap but functional
reviews.text: It's a hit or miss. I read the reviews before I bought it. And was scared off. But I ended up getting it. And it came in a decent box. Very nice sleek keyboard with no missing or loose keys like I've seen others have.  Rid not come with batteries. But only needs 1 AA and 2 AAA. So that wasn't too bad. reviews.title: Liked it until .....
reviews.text:
As I began typing, I liked the smooth, quite feel BUT quickly discovered that this keyboard does NOT have a 'Print Screen' key, which is vital when working. DO NOT Buy this if you need it for work. As you can see in the picture provided, the 'F11' key is NOT labeled.
F11 toggles from Full Screen back to regular screen. The first 4 keys at the top of the number key pad are TOTALLY UNNECESSARY.
1st key) Same function as Ctrl+C (Copy)
2nd key) Does Absolutely Nothing!
3rd key) Same function as Ctrl+V, (Paste)
4th key) Same function as Ctrl+X (Cut)
Had this keyboard followed the SAME FORMAT
The keyboard is overpriced to be missing a vital function as Print Screen Key.
